selectedProjects.whyItMatters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +2，前 3 日均值 0.3，加速度 6x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。

llmSummary.oneLiner: Colossal-AI is an open-source deep learning system that makes large AI models cheaper, faster, and more accessible through advanced parallelism and heterogeneous memory management.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Training and deploying large AI models (e.g., LLMs, video generation models) is prohibitively expensive and complex. Colossal-AI reduces cost and time by providing efficient distributed training and inference with minimal code changes.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has a sudden breakout with an acceleration of 6 (high), despite a low 7-day average star delta of -0.6. With 41,385 total stars and 4,505 forks, it's a well-established project that recently saw a spike in attention, possibly due to new benchmarks (B200 GPUs showing 50-70% throughput gains) or the release of Open-Sora and DeepSeek fine-tuning guides.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. However, recent README updates highlight new benchmarks on B200 GPUs, DeepSeek 671B fine-tuning, and Open-Sora video generation, which may have driven the breakout.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It offers a practical, cost-saving solution for training large models (e.g., 30% cost reduction with FP8), supports cutting-edge hardware (B200, H200), and provides turnkey examples for popular models like LLaMA, GPT, and Stable Diffusion.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Colossal-AI is a powerful tool for developers who need to scale model training or inference without deep distributed systems expertise. Its support for multiple parallelism strategies and heterogeneous memory makes it versatile for both research and production.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward democratizing large model training: developers can now achieve near-linear scaling on multi-GPU setups with minimal code changes, reducing the barrier to entry for building foundation models.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI researchers, ML engineers, and startups working on large-scale model training or inference, especially those using PyTorch and seeking cost-effective GPU utilization.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is backed by a company (HPC-AI Tech) that also offers paid cloud services, which may lead to feature prioritization for commercial users. Additionally, the rapid pace of change in AI infrastructure could make some parallelism strategies obsolete.

llmSummary.oneLiner: NextChat is a lightweight, cross-platform AI chat client that supports multiple LLMs (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek) with one-click deployment and a privacy-first local-storage design.
llmSummary.problemSolved: It provides a unified, fast, and privacy-respecting interface for interacting with various AI models, eliminating the need to switch between different chat UIs or expose API keys to third-party services.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 88,131 stars and a 24h star delta of 22, the project shows sustained high interest. The acceleration ratio of 2.9 (high) indicates a sudden breakout in attention, likely driven by recent feature additions like MCP support, real-time chat, and the iOS app release. The 7-day average star delta of 7.8 confirms consistent growth, but the acceleration signals a recent spike.
llmSummary.whatChanged: Recent commits and README updates highlight the addition of MCP (Model Context Protocol) support, real-time chat, and the launch of the iOS app. These features expand the project's utility and appeal, likely triggering the breakout.
llmSummary.whyTrending: NextChat combines ease of deployment (one-click Vercel), broad model support, and a polished cross-platform desktop app, making it a go-to tool for developers and power users who want a self-hosted, customizable AI assistant.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This project demonstrates the demand for lightweight, multi-model chat UIs that prioritize privacy and local storage. Developers can learn from its architecture (Next.js + Tauri) and plugin system to build similar tools.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The rapid adoption of NextChat signals a shift toward unified, self-hosted AI interfaces that reduce dependency on single providers. The MCP support hints at a future where AI tools interoperate via standardized protocols, opening opportunities for plugin ecosystems.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers, AI enthusiasts, and power users who want a fast, private, and customizable chat interface for multiple LLMs, including those running local models.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project relies on third-party API keys and services; users must manage their own keys. The rapid pace of features may introduce instability. No recent release tag could indicate a focus on bleeding-edge commits over stable releases.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A curated collection of .mdc configuration files that customize Cursor AI editor behavior for specific frameworks, libraries, and workflows.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers using Cursor AI often get generic suggestions that don't respect project-specific conventions, architecture, or preferred libraries. This repo provides ready-to-use rule files that inject context (e.g., 'use getSession not getUser for auth') so the AI generates more relevant, consistent code with fewer manual corrections.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has 39,842 stars and is accelerating sharply: 30 stars in the last 24 hours, 125 in the last 7 days, with a 7-day average of 16 stars/day and a 3-day average of 10.7 stars/day. The acceleration ratio of 2.8 (high) and the 'sudden_breakout' trend type indicate a recent spike in attention, likely driven by the growing adoption of Cursor AI and the need for project-specific rules.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed 2026-05-30) and includes new sponsorship banners and rule additions, but there is no release or external buzz event. The acceleration likely reflects broader Cursor AI adoption and word-of-mouth within developer communities.
llmSummary.whyTrending: As Cursor AI gains popularity, developers realize that generic AI suggestions fall short for complex projects. This repo fills a practical need by offering a community-maintained library of rules that make Cursor smarter about specific stacks (Next.js, React, Svelte, etc.), reducing friction and improving code quality.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you use Cursor AI, this repo is a shortcut to better AI suggestions. Drop the relevant .mdc files into your project's .cursor/rules/ directory to instantly align the AI with your tech stack and conventions.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'AI configuration as a shared asset' — teams are treating AI behavior as something that can be version-controlled, reviewed, and optimized just like code. Expect more curated rule collections and possibly a marketplace for AI editor rules.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers using Cursor AI editor, especially those working with modern web frameworks (Next.js, React, Svelte, Angular, Astro, etc.) who want more accurate and context-aware AI code generation.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The rules are community-contributed and may become outdated as frameworks evolve. Some rules may conflict or be overly specific. No official Cursor endorsement. The repo's quality depends on ongoing maintenance.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A comprehensive, MCP-powered front-end quality checklist with 385 rules across 11 categories, designed for both human developers and AI agents.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Provides a structured, actionable front-end best practices checklist that can be used interactively on the web, via MCP tools for AI agents, or as a static README, ensuring consistent code quality and compliance across projects.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 72,971 stars, a 24-hour star delta of 14, and a high acceleration of 2.2, this project is experiencing a sudden breakout in attention. The recent release and active commits (within 7 days) indicate ongoing development, making it a timely resource for developers adopting AI-assisted workflows.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The project recently added MCP server support and a skills system, enabling AI agents to directly use the checklist for code review and audits. This shift from a static checklist to an interactive, agent-compatible tool likely drove the sudden spike in interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It bridges the gap between traditional front-end best practices and modern AI agent workflows, offering a practical, ready-to-use rule corpus that agents can query via MCP. This dual human/AI focus is highly relevant as developers seek to integrate AI into their development processes.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Front-End Checklist is a mature, well-structured resource that can be immediately used to enforce front-end quality in both manual reviews and automated AI agent audits. Its MCP integration makes it a powerful tool for teams adopting AI-assisted development.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a growing trend of turning static documentation into machine-consumable, agent-friendly formats. For AI developers, it demonstrates how to package domain knowledge (e.g., front-end rules) as MCP tools, enabling agents to perform structured, reliable code reviews without hallucination.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Front-end developers, web developers, QA engineers, and AI/ML engineers building agent-based code review or auditing tools.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The checklist is opinionated and may not cover all edge cases or specific framework nuances. Over-reliance on automated checks could miss context-specific issues. The MCP server is hosted externally, so availability and latency depend on the provider.

llmSummary.oneLiner: CCPM is an Agent Skill that turns AI coding agents into structured project managers using GitHub Issues and parallel Git worktrees for spec-driven, multi-agent development.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI coding sessions lose context, block on sequential tasks, and produce untraceable code. CCPM enforces a PRD→Epic→Issue→Code pipeline with parallel agent execution and full traceability via GitHub Issues.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 8,166 stars, a 7-day average delta of 2.4, and a sudden acceleration to 2.4 (high), CCPM is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour delta of 4 and 7-day delta of 17 indicate sustained, accelerating interest. This is not a flash spike but a rapidly growing project with strong community signals.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The high acceleration and sudden_breakout classification suggest recent external mentions (e.g., social media, newsletters) or word-of-mouth from early adopters. The README mentions integration with multiple AI harnesses, which may have expanded its reach.
llmSummary.whyTrending: CCPM addresses a critical pain point in AI-assisted coding: context loss and lack of structured project management. Its promise of parallel agent execution and full traceability resonates with developers moving from 'vibe coding' to production-grade AI workflows. The Agent Skills compatibility lowers adoption friction.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: CCPM offers a ready-to-use framework for structured, multi-agent development. Developers can adopt it to improve code quality, reduce context switching, and enable team collaboration with AI agents. It's particularly valuable for teams using Claude Code, Codex, or similar tools.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI-assisted developers and teams using agent-based coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Factory, etc.) who want structured project management, parallel execution, and traceability. Also relevant for open-source maintainers and solo developers managing complex projects.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is early-stage (no recent release, no recent commits within 7 days). The high star count may be driven by hype rather than proven reliability. Dependency on GitHub Issues and `gh` CLI may limit adoption for teams using other platforms. The 'no vibe coding' philosophy may not suit all workflows.

modelDemoSignals.title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation
modelDemoSignals.description: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack
modelDemoSignals.summary: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack effective mechanisms to align dense 2D image tokens with sparse 3D voxel latents, resulting in a cross-modal correspondence bottleneck. To address these issues, we propose FLUX3D, a scalable image-to-3DGS framework that boosts both representation learning and cross-modal alignment during generation. We first revisit 2D feature selection for sparse-voxel-based 3D representation learning, propose Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT) and couple it with a decoder-only architecture to improve 3DGS reconstruction fidelity. We also design a sparse-structure-aware diffusion framework, which integrates the Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT) and Modal-Aware Rotary Positional Embedding (MARoPE) to achieve geometry-agnostic 2D-3D alignment. Extensive benchmark experiments demonstrate that FLUX3D yields substantial improvements in appearance fidelity and significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.
modelDemoSignals.author: Haorui Ji, Weizhe Liu, Hongdong Li, Hengkai Guo
modelDemoSignals.recommendedReason: Matched AI developer keywords: embedding, alignment, benchmark

modelDemoSignals.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
modelDemoSignals.description: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct
modelDemoSignals.summary: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct more than 100 controlled ablation experiments to systematically investigate each stage of the pipeline, yielding insights on the importance of task sources and diversity. We then assemble a training set of 100K examples from our pipeline and fine-tune Qwen3-32B on this dataset, which yields an average accuracy of 44.8% across seven agentic benchmarks and a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model (Nemotron-Terminal-32B, 40.9%). Moreover, our training data exhibits strong scaling properties, outperforming alternative open datasets at every training set size in compute-controlled comparisons. We publicly release our training sets, data pipeline, experimental data, and models at openthoughts.ai to support future open research on agentic model training.
modelDemoSignals.author: Negin Raoof, Richard Zhuang, Marianna Nezhurina, Etash Guha, Atula Tejaswi, Ryan Marten, Charlie F. Ruan, Tyler Griggs, Alexander Glenn Shaw, Hritik Bansal, E. modelDemoSignals.title: It's Complicated: On the Design and Evaluation of AI-Powered AAC Interfaces
modelDemoSignals.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) can enhance what people who use augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) are able to do with their systems. However, evaluating AI-powered AAC interfaces can be difficult. People are intersectional beings and current evaluation metrics can struggle to capture the multifaceted and nuanced desires people may have for their AAC. We explore the complicated nature of six AAC problem spaces, explore how AI might be used in these spaces, and suggest more robust meth
modelDemoSignals.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) can enhance what people who use augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) are able to do with their systems. However, evaluating AI-powered AAC interfaces can be difficult. People are intersectional beings and current evaluation metrics can struggle to capture the multifaceted and nuanced desires people may have for their AAC. We explore the complicated nature of six AAC problem spaces, explore how AI might be used in these spaces, and suggest more robust methods of evaluation that take the intersectional nuances of people into account. We also discuss broader issues that arise across these problem spaces and how they could be addressed using our proposed evaluation methods.
modelDemoSignals.author: Blade Frisch, Will Wade, Dylan Gaines, Michelle Kinsella, Betts Peters, Tamara Broderick, Keith Vertanen

modelDemoSignals.title: Real vs. Complex Spectral Bases for Neural Operators: The Role of Green's Function Alignment
modelDemoSignals.description: Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) learn solution operators of partial differential equations by parameterizing global convolutions in the complex Fourier domain. For real-valued PDE solutions, the complex FFT carries representational redundancy through conjugate symmetry. We introduce the Hartley Neural Operator (HNO), the exact real-valued mirror of FNO: it replaces the FFT with the purely real Discrete Hartley Transform and learns a single real multiplier per retained spectral mode, with no compl
modelDemoSignals.summary: Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) learn solution operators of partial differential equations by parameterizing global convolutions in the complex Fourier domain. For real-valued PDE solutions, the complex FFT carries representational redundancy through conjugate symmetry. We introduce the Hartley Neural Operator (HNO), the exact real-valued mirror of FNO: it replaces the FFT with the purely real Discrete Hartley Transform and learns a single real multiplier per retained spectral mode, with no complex arithmetic. Because the real Hartley spectrum is not halved by conjugate symmetry, HNO retains twice as many frequency corners as FNO but one real weight where FNO carries a complex pair, so the two operators are iso-parametric at equal width and differ only in spectral basis. Our central thesis is that the best basis is a property of the operator. Self-adjoint elliptic operators (Poisson, biharmonic) have real, symmetric Green's functions that the real Hartley multiplier diagonalizes exactly, and HNO is favored there. Time-dependent operators carry phase, from oscillation in the wave equation to transport in advection, Burgers, and Navier-Stokes, which a real diagonal multiplier cannot represent, so FNO is favored there, and increasingly so with the operator's phase content, leaving the phaseless heat equation as the borderline case. Training both operators identically and benchmarking across PDE classes, initial-condition families, and boundary conditions, we find an elliptic-versus-time-dependent split that is monotone in operator phase content and matches the Green's-function theory we develop. Rather than a universal winner, our findings give a predictive rule: match the spectral basis to the symmetry of the solution operator.
modelDemoSignals.author: Jason Sulskis, Sathya Ravi

modelDemoSignals.title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation
modelDemoSignals.description: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reas
modelDemoSignals.summary: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reasoning framework for query-conditioned image generation. IV-CoT decomposes the visual conditioning queries into a structural-to-semantic cascade, where structural queries first form a latent visual plan and semantic queries then render appearance conditioned on this plan. To guide the structural queries, we introduce training-only sketch supervision, which encourages them to capture structure from sketches without requiring sketch extraction or intermediate decoding at inference time. IV-CoT performs implicit CoT reasoning in a single forward pass and achieves superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench. Visualizations and analyses demonstrate that the learned structural and semantic queries play complementary roles in structure-aware generation.
modelDemoSignals.author: Zixuan Li, Haokun Lin, Yicheng Xiao, Zhiwei Li, Xinyang Song, Zelong Zheng, Yong He, Heng Yao, Ke Ding, Chao Yu, Chuan Yuan, Qi Li, Zhenan Sun

aihotHighlights.title: 思考即回忆：推理如何解锁LLM中的参数化知识
aihotHighlights.summary: Google Research研究发现，推理（chain-of-thought）能帮助大语言模型（LLM）回忆简单事实，即使这些事实无需复杂推导。在Gemini-2.5 Flash和Pro以及Qwen3-32B上，启用推理后模型能够回答原本无法直接回答的简单问题，pass@k显示正确事实存在于输出分布中。该现象由两个机制驱动：一是生成的推理token充当计算缓冲，允许模型进行隐藏计算以提取参数化知识；二是推理过程中产生的相关事实起到启动效应（factual priming），帮助模型激活正确答案。

aihotHighlights.title: Qwen-AgentWorld：原生语言世界模型，模拟7种Agent环境并超越Claude Opus 4.8和GPT-5.4
aihotHighlights.summary: Qwen-AgentWorld是一个原生语言世界模型，端到端以环境建模为训练目标，而非事后适配。它在单一模型中模拟MCP、Search、Terminal、SWE、Web、OS、Android等7种Agent环境，并在AgentWorldBench上超越Claude Opus 4.8和GPT-5.4。两个探索方向：1）将世界模型用作可控Sim RL的环境模拟器，模拟环境训练的Agent在部分任务上超过真实环境训练；2）仅做环境预测（不进行Agent训练）的预测能力零微调迁移到多轮Agent任务，在多个benchmark上均有提升。已开源35B MoE版本及对应benchmark。

aihotHighlights.title: NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel：一行代码加速Transformer MoE模型微调
aihotHighlights.summary: NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 是基于 Transformers v5 的开源库，添加 Expert Parallelism、DeepEP 融合 all-to-all 调度和 TransformerEngine 内核。在 MoE 模型微调中，相比原生 v5，训练吞吐量提升 3.4-3.7 倍，GPU 内存减少 29-32%，仅需改动一行 import。在 16 节点 128 张 H100 上全微调 Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B A55B 时，v5 因内存不足无法运行，而 AutoModel 凭借 EP=64 专家并行使训练可行。单节点 30B MoE 模型（如 Qwen3-30B-A3B）同样获得可量化的性能优势。

aihotHighlights.title: 里德·霍夫曼称SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，xAI则是"彻底的灾难"
aihotHighlights.summary: LinkedIn联合创始人、Anthropic和OpenAI投资者Reid Hoffman在播客中公开批评SpaceX和xAI。他指出SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，6月12日上市后收购AI编程工具Cursor属于"花钱买相关性"；xAI则是"彻底的灾难"，所有11位联合创始人已离职，Grok模型在基准测试中落后于Anthropic和OpenAI。他还批评美国政府6月11日以出口管制为由强制Anthropic下架Fable和Mythos模型，理由仅为Amazon CEO报告Fable 5存在jailbreak漏洞，称此举"专断随意"。Hoffman认为Anthropic和OpenAI均有巨大发展空间，但Cursor可能已过巅峰。他建议年轻人不要抵制AI。

aihotHighlights.title: 字节跳动技术副总裁洪定坤：AI Coding 的实践与探索
aihotHighlights.summary: 在火山引擎Force大会，字节跳动技术副总裁洪定坤分享AI Coding实践。过去一年，字节AI代码贡献率增长6倍，tokens消耗增长5倍，但过度关注单一指标可能失真--TRAE团队代码超90%由AI生成，人均需求吞吐率仅提升60%。900次实验显示，主流Coding模型组合代码正确率超80%，但可交付性仅40-60分；结合Harness基建后提升至80分。AI降低编程门槛但需优化指标、治理、协作。字节探索原型驱动开发，能力沉淀至TRAE（日均Token消耗5.6万亿，增长50倍），并推出TRAE Work。

aihotHighlights.title: 火山引擎推出Agent Ready基础设施，AgentKit与ArkClaw企业版升级
aihotHighlights.summary: 火山引擎在FORCE大会推出面向企业智能应用的Agent Ready基础设施，构建AI云与Agent三层架构。AgentKit升级提供Identity、Runtime、Sandbox、Evaluation等模块，实现Agent可靠、可控、可衡量。Identity已接入数千家身份体系，Runtime支持长程任务和分钟级12万沙箱并发。ArkClaw企业版集成Agent广场、技能中心与企业知识库，支持IDP/SSO/OAuth及飞书、钉钉等IM入口统一管控。实践案例：海底捞门店经营Agent将小时级工作压缩到分钟级，人工跟进时长缩减70%，巡检满意度提升50%；创维酷开借助ArkClaw终端版打造AIOS，Token消耗节省50%，支撑百万级终端。

aihotHighlights.title: DFlash：块扩散草稿模型实现最高15倍吞吐量提升
aihotHighlights.summary: DFlash 由 UC San Diego 团队提出，是一种用于投机解码的轻量块扩散草稿模型。它一次前向推理生成整块 token，再由目标模型并行验证，保证输出无损。相比 EAGLE-3，DFlash 实现最高 2.5 倍加速，在 Qwen3-8B 等多种模型上平均无损加速超过 6 倍（MATH-500 达 6.08×）。在 NVIDIA Blackwell 上（TensorRT-LLM），gpt-oss-120b 模型吞吐量提升最高 15 倍，约为 EAGLE-3 的 1.5 倍。核心创新是将目标模型多层隐藏特征注入草稿模型每一层的 Key-Value 投影，使接受长度随草稿深度增长。

aihotHighlights.title: OpenAI ChatGPT 语音最大规模升级：双向AI语音模型 Bidi 1 已上线测试
aihotHighlights.summary: 6月23日，部分用户反馈 ChatGPT 网页版和 App 版上线了双向 AI 语音模型 Bidi 1，位于设置模型选择器中，与标准语音和高级语音并列。该模型支持边说话边监听，用户可在对话中途打断并发出新指令，例如要求从1数到10时中途喊停倒数，模型会立即切换执行。OpenAI 尚未官宣，预计本周启动更大范围测试。

aihotHighlights.title: Qwen-AgentWorld 开源：让 Agent 学会"先预测，再行动"
aihotHighlights.summary: 通义千问推出首个原生语言世界模型 Qwen-AgentWorld，覆盖 MCP、Search、Terminal、SWE、Web、OS、Android 七大领域。模型基于超 1000 万条真实交互轨迹，经 CPT→SFT→RL 三阶段训练，在 AgentWorldBench 上超越 GPT-5.4（58.25）和 Claude Opus 4.8，Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B 取得 58.71 分。两种范式已验证其能力：作为解耦环境模拟器实现可控 Sim RL，在 WideSearch 上超越真实环境 RL（F1 50.3% vs 45.6%）；作为智能体基础模型，LWM 预热可迁移至七个基准（三个完全未出现在训练集中）。模型与评测基准已开源。

aihotHighlights.title: 今天，豆包正式推出专业版
aihotHighlights.summary: 豆包专业版基于豆包2.1系列大模型上线，面向复杂办公与生产力场景。办公任务模式接入可执行Agent任务的豆包2.1模型，支持操作本地电脑、浏览器、调用Skills技能、定时任务，内置Office办公套件，并可生成带后端数据库的在线应用。免费用户可体验豆包2.1 Turbo版办公任务模式，专业版接入豆包2.1 Pro模型。定价：标准套餐68元/月（连续包月），加强套餐200元/月，高级套餐500元/月。大学生认证后标准套餐38元/月，持续6个月。

aihotHighlights.title: FFASR 排行榜发布：真实远场条件下 ASR 评测
aihotHighlights.summary: Treble Technologies 与 Hugging Face 联合推出 FFASR（Far-Field ASR）排行榜，这是首个开源社区驱动的真实远场声学条件 ASR 评测基准。传统近场评测无法反映混响、背景噪声和麦克风距离带来的性能下降。FFASR 使用混合波模拟引擎生成声学数据，涵盖 14 种房间（20-470 m3）和三个信噪比级别（远场高 SNR >14 dB、中 SNR 8-12 dB、低 SNR <6 dB），加上近场干燥条件，共四类条件决定主排名。另有实验室实测/模拟验证轨道和移动声源 beta 版。性能指标同时报告词错误率（WER）和实时因子（RTFx，在 NVIDIA L4 GPU 上评估）。未来将支持多说话人场景、麦克风阵列和回声消除。

items.title: Mistral OCR 4
items.summary: Mistral AI 发布 OCR 4，新增边界框、块分类（标题、表格、方程式、签名等）及逐页逐词置信度分数。支持 170 种语言、10 个语系，可单容器全自托管部署。在 OlmOCRBench 上得分 85.20，独立标注者偏好率平均 72%。定价每 1000 页 $4，Batch API 享 50% 折扣。可通过 API 或 Mistral Studio 的 Document AI 调用。

multiSourceItems.title: 思考即回忆：推理如何解锁LLM中的参数化知识
multiSourceItems.summary: Google Research研究发现，推理（chain-of-thought）能帮助大语言模型（LLM）回忆简单事实，即使这些事实无需复杂推导。在Gemini-2.5 Flash和Pro以及Qwen3-32B上，启用推理后模型能够回答原本无法直接回答的简单问题，pass@k显示正确事实存在于输出分布中。该现象由两个机制驱动：一是生成的推理token充当计算缓冲，允许模型进行隐藏计算以提取参数化知识；二是推理过程中产生的相关事实起到启动效应（factual priming），帮助模型激活正确答案。

multiSourceItems.title: Figma在Config 2026押注人类判断，画布AI能力却来自第三方
multiSourceItems.summary: Figma在Config 2026将设计画布扩展至代码、动画、3D深度和着色器效果，并集成去年收购的Weave工作流系统。新功能包括Code Layers（代码与设计并存）、Motion动画、深度层、Shader及Generative Plugins。协作方面，团队可搜索复用AI提示词、保存工作流为技能、共享插件。Figma的AI功能依赖Anthropic、OpenAI和Google等外部模型，推理成本挤压利润率。同时，Anthropic等公司的竞争产品可直接生成界面，构成威胁。

multiSourceItems.title: Qwen-AgentWorld：原生语言世界模型，模拟7种Agent环境并超越Claude Opus 4.8和GPT-5.4
multiSourceItems.summary: Qwen-AgentWorld是一个原生语言世界模型，端到端以环境建模为训练目标，而非事后适配。它在单一模型中模拟MCP、Search、Terminal、SWE、Web、OS、Android等7种Agent环境，并在AgentWorldBench上超越Claude Opus 4.8和GPT-5.4。两个探索方向：1）将世界模型用作可控Sim RL的环境模拟器，模拟环境训练的Agent在部分任务上超过真实环境训练；2）仅做环境预测（不进行Agent训练）的预测能力零微调迁移到多轮Agent任务，在多个benchmark上均有提升。已开源35B MoE版本及对应benchmark。

raw.titleEn: Qwen直接训了一个能模拟7种Agent环境的语言世界模型，叫Qwen-AgentWorld。 它不是先训Agent再加环境，而是从头就把"环境建模"当成核心训练目标。 模型要学会预测终端会输出什…

multiSourceItems.title: NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel：一行代码加速Transformer MoE模型微调
multiSourceItems.summary: NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 是基于 Transformers v5 的开源库，添加 Expert Parallelism、DeepEP 融合 all-to-all 调度和 TransformerEngine 内核。在 MoE 模型微调中，相比原生 v5，训练吞吐量提升 3.4-3.7 倍，GPU 内存减少 29-32%，仅需改动一行 import。在 16 节点 128 张 H100 上全微调 Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B A55B 时，v5 因内存不足无法运行，而 AutoModel 凭借 EP=64 专家并行使训练可行。单节点 30B MoE 模型（如 Qwen3-30B-A3B）同样获得可量化的性能优势。

multiSourceItems.title: 里德·霍夫曼称SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，xAI则是"彻底的灾难"
multiSourceItems.summary: LinkedIn联合创始人、Anthropic和OpenAI投资者Reid Hoffman在播客中公开批评SpaceX和xAI。他指出SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，6月12日上市后收购AI编程工具Cursor属于"花钱买相关性"；xAI则是"彻底的灾难"，所有11位联合创始人已离职，Grok模型在基准测试中落后于Anthropic和OpenAI。他还批评美国政府6月11日以出口管制为由强制Anthropic下架Fable和Mythos模型，理由仅为Amazon CEO报告Fable 5存在jailbreak漏洞，称此举"专断随意"。Hoffman认为Anthropic和OpenAI均有巨大发展空间，但Cursor可能已过巅峰。他建议年轻人不要抵制AI。

multiSourceItems.title: 字节跳动技术副总裁洪定坤：AI Coding 的实践与探索
multiSourceItems.summary: 在火山引擎Force大会，字节跳动技术副总裁洪定坤分享AI Coding实践。过去一年，字节AI代码贡献率增长6倍，tokens消耗增长5倍，但过度关注单一指标可能失真--TRAE团队代码超90%由AI生成，人均需求吞吐率仅提升60%。900次实验显示，主流Coding模型组合代码正确率超80%，但可交付性仅40-60分；结合Harness基建后提升至80分。AI降低编程门槛但需优化指标、治理、协作。字节探索原型驱动开发，能力沉淀至TRAE（日均Token消耗5.6万亿，增长50倍），并推出TRAE Work。

multiSourceItems.title: 火山引擎推出Agent Ready基础设施，AgentKit与ArkClaw企业版升级
multiSourceItems.summary: 火山引擎在FORCE大会推出面向企业智能应用的Agent Ready基础设施，构建AI云与Agent三层架构。AgentKit升级提供Identity、Runtime、Sandbox、Evaluation等模块，实现Agent可靠、可控、可衡量。Identity已接入数千家身份体系，Runtime支持长程任务和分钟级12万沙箱并发。ArkClaw企业版集成Agent广场、技能中心与企业知识库，支持IDP/SSO/OAuth及飞书、钉钉等IM入口统一管控。实践案例：海底捞门店经营Agent将小时级工作压缩到分钟级，人工跟进时长缩减70%，巡检满意度提升50%；创维酷开借助ArkClaw终端版打造AIOS，Token消耗节省50%，支撑百万级终端。

multiSourceItems.title: DFlash：块扩散草稿模型实现最高15倍吞吐量提升
multiSourceItems.summary: DFlash 由 UC San Diego 团队提出，是一种用于投机解码的轻量块扩散草稿模型。它一次前向推理生成整块 token，再由目标模型并行验证，保证输出无损。相比 EAGLE-3，DFlash 实现最高 2.5 倍加速，在 Qwen3-8B 等多种模型上平均无损加速超过 6 倍（MATH-500 达 6.08×）。在 NVIDIA Blackwell 上（TensorRT-LLM），gpt-oss-120b 模型吞吐量提升最高 15 倍，约为 EAGLE-3 的 1.5 倍。核心创新是将目标模型多层隐藏特征注入草稿模型每一层的 Key-Value 投影，使接受长度随草稿深度增长。

multiSourceItems.title: OpenAI ChatGPT 语音最大规模升级：双向AI语音模型 Bidi 1 已上线测试
multiSourceItems.summary: 6月23日，部分用户反馈 ChatGPT 网页版和 App 版上线了双向 AI 语音模型 Bidi 1，位于设置模型选择器中，与标准语音和高级语音并列。该模型支持边说话边监听，用户可在对话中途打断并发出新指令，例如要求从1数到10时中途喊停倒数，模型会立即切换执行。OpenAI 尚未官宣，预计本周启动更大范围测试。

multiSourceItems.title: Qwen-AgentWorld 开源：让 Agent 学会"先预测，再行动"
multiSourceItems.summary: 通义千问推出首个原生语言世界模型 Qwen-AgentWorld，覆盖 MCP、Search、Terminal、SWE、Web、OS、Android 七大领域。模型基于超 1000 万条真实交互轨迹，经 CPT→SFT→RL 三阶段训练，在 AgentWorldBench 上超越 GPT-5.4（58.25）和 Claude Opus 4.8，Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B 取得 58.71 分。两种范式已验证其能力：作为解耦环境模拟器实现可控 Sim RL，在 WideSearch 上超越真实环境 RL（F1 50.3% vs 45.6%）；作为智能体基础模型，LWM 预热可迁移至七个基准（三个完全未出现在训练集中）。模型与评测基准已开源。

multiSourceItems.title: 今天，豆包正式推出专业版
multiSourceItems.summary: 豆包专业版基于豆包2.1系列大模型上线，面向复杂办公与生产力场景。办公任务模式接入可执行Agent任务的豆包2.1模型，支持操作本地电脑、浏览器、调用Skills技能、定时任务，内置Office办公套件，并可生成带后端数据库的在线应用。免费用户可体验豆包2.1 Turbo版办公任务模式，专业版接入豆包2.1 Pro模型。定价：标准套餐68元/月（连续包月），加强套餐200元/月，高级套餐500元/月。大学生认证后标准套餐38元/月，持续6个月。

multiSourceItems.title: FFASR 排行榜发布：真实远场条件下 ASR 评测
multiSourceItems.summary: Treble Technologies 与 Hugging Face 联合推出 FFASR（Far-Field ASR）排行榜，这是首个开源社区驱动的真实远场声学条件 ASR 评测基准。传统近场评测无法反映混响、背景噪声和麦克风距离带来的性能下降。FFASR 使用混合波模拟引擎生成声学数据，涵盖 14 种房间（20-470 m3）和三个信噪比级别（远场高 SNR >14 dB、中 SNR 8-12 dB、低 SNR <6 dB），加上近场干燥条件，共四类条件决定主排名。另有实验室实测/模拟验证轨道和移动声源 beta 版。性能指标同时报告词错误率（WER）和实时因子（RTFx，在 NVIDIA L4 GPU 上评估）。未来将支持多说话人场景、麦克风阵列和回声消除。

multiSourceItems.title: AI招聘工具存在种族偏见和系统性排斥；黑人占比26%，亚裔占比15%
multiSourceItems.summary: 一项覆盖340万人、400万份申请、150家雇主和1700个职位的大规模实地研究发现，AI招聘筛选工具存在显著的种族歧视：26%的黑人申请者和15%的亚裔申请者遭遇算法对其族群的系统性排斥；若AI按推荐率最高群体（通常为白人）标准执行，将有4万份额外申请进入下一轮。多数雇主依赖同一第三方供应商算法，形成"算法单一文化"，导致10%提交4份申请者被所有职位拒绝。对比同期未用AI的招聘数据（8.3万份申请、108家财富500强企业），未发现此类模式。研究呼吁对算法招聘进行独立监管。

multiSourceItems.title: Oracle因AI应用裁员21000人，债务驱动云基础设施投资
multiSourceItems.summary: Oracle在截至5月31日的财年裁员21000人，员工总数降至141，000人，降幅12.9%。公司称AI技术的采用导致劳动力缩减，同时重组成本达18亿美元，同比增长481%。Oracle计划2026年通过债务和股权筹集450至500亿美元，扩建Oracle Cloud Infrastructure，服务OpenAI、xAI、AMD、Nvidia、Meta等客户。公司债务超1200亿美元。分析人士指出裁员有助于改善现金流，但Oracle也承认大规模裁员可能带来生产力下降、人才短缺和员工士气受损等风险。

multiSourceItems.title: GitHub联合开源联盟呼吁修改加州AI透明度法案以保护开源
multiSourceItems.summary: GitHub 联合 Black Forest Labs、Hugging Face 与 Mozilla Corporation 组成开源联盟，呼吁对加州 AI 透明度法案（SB 942，拟由 SB 1000 修正）进行针对性修改。当前草案要求开发者在下游用户未履行义务时撤销开源许可证，这与开源许可证永久不可撤销的性质冲突。联盟认为该要求非必要，已有直接监管和执法机制，并建议参考欧盟 AI 法案的透明度实践规范，以向下游用户通知最佳实践文档的方式替代撤销条款。GitHub 支持这些修正，以在保持透明度目标的同时兼容开源开发模式。

multiSourceItems.title: Mistral OCR 4
multiSourceItems.summary: Mistral AI 发布 OCR 4，新增边界框、块分类（标题、表格、方程式、签名等）及逐页逐词置信度分数。支持 170 种语言、10 个语系，可单容器全自托管部署。在 OlmOCRBench 上得分 85.20，独立标注者偏好率平均 72%。定价每 1000 页 $4，Batch API 享 50% 折扣。可通过 API 或 Mistral Studio 的 Document AI 调用。

multiSourceItems.title: IBM 开源 CUGA：轻量级智能体框架，提供二十余个单文件示例应用
multiSourceItems.summary: IBM 开源了 CUGA（Configurable Generalist Agent），一个处理规划、执行循环、工具调用和状态管理的轻量级智能体框架。开发者只需提供工具列表和提示词即可构建 CugaAgent。内置计划-执行-反思循环，在 AppWorld（2025年7月-2026年2月）和 WebArena（2025年2月-9月）基准上排名第一。支持 Fast / Balanced / Accurate 三种推理模式，代码执行可在本地、Docker 或 E2B 沙箱中运行。可互换工具支持 OpenAPI、MCP 和 LangChain 函数，通过环境变量一键切换 OpenAI、watsonx、Ollama 等提供商。随框架发布二十余个单文件示例应用，涵盖电影推荐、IBM Cloud 架构顾问等场景，每个应用仅需一个 FastAPI 文件。

multiSourceItems.title: 网易有道发布 Confucius4-TTS：14 语种跨语种无口音语音克隆开源模型
multiSourceItems.summary: 网易有道推出"子曰 4.0"TTS 引擎 Confucius4-TTS，声称是业内首个支持 14 种语言跨语种无口音、且无需参考文本即可完成语音克隆的开源模型。用户仅需 3 秒音频即可实现零样本音色克隆，克隆音色与原声相似度超 85%，任务准确度达 97%。模型支持中文、英语等 14 种语言，首创音频 Prompt 情感克隆迁移。底层采用 GPT 式语义大模型、SSL 预训练特征与 ECAPA-TDNN 说话人编码器、Flow Matching 框架。已全量开源（Apache 协议），提供 54GB 资源包供本地部署。

multiSourceItems.title: 国内首个高考志愿AI测评出炉，千问多项表现超过资深咨询师
multiSourceItems.summary: 友松实验室发布国内首个高考志愿AI能力测评报告，测试千问高考志愿填报Agent四大模块。与53位平均从业4.6年的人类咨询师对照，千问表现更稳定精确：44道事实题全对；模拟10个志愿中6个可录取；100场匿名对比中专家58次倾向千问回答。使用千问辅助后，人类咨询师正确率提升，耗时减少约27%。该Agent基于千问高考志愿大模型和夸克8年高考数据，覆盖约3000所院校、2000多个专业。

multiSourceItems.title: 五眼联盟警告：AI网络威胁数月内将影响普通用户
multiSourceItems.summary: 2026年6月22日，五眼联盟（美、英、加、澳、新）网络安全部门联合警告，即将到来的AI模型（如OpenAI的GPT-5.5-Cyber、Anthropic的Mythos）将降低编写复杂攻击代码的门槛。自动化智能体可全天候扫描互联网漏洞，大幅缩短安全窗口期。AI驱动的超个性化钓鱼诈骗已在亚太蔓延，印度2026年初勒索软件事件激增165%。五眼联盟建议企业部署自动化防御AI，个人用户开启多因素认证、删除闲置账户。

multiSourceItems.title: 京东全栈开源JoyAI-VL-Interaction，从"一问一答"走向"边看边说"
multiSourceItems.summary: 京东近日开源全球首个全栈交互模型JoyAI-VL-Interaction，获vLLM-Omni原生支持。该模型能持续观察视频流、主动判断关键事件并实时响应，支持将复杂任务委托后台Agent处理。在58个真人盲评中，对比豆包视频通话助手胜率77.6%，对比Gemini视频通话助手胜率87.9%，监控预警场景达100%胜率。开源内容包括模型权重、交互数据集、训练方案及完整可部署系统，支持摄像头、直播流等视频输入及语音交互、长期记忆、vLLM部署，适用于安防监控、老人看护、直播讲解等实时场景。

multiSourceItems.title: 豆包音频生成模型1.0发布，重新定义AI音频创作
multiSourceItems.summary: 火山引擎正式发布豆包音频生成模型1.0（Doubao-Seed-Audio 1.0），支持文本与音频参考生成，端到端输出目标音频。单条Prompt可编排多角色对白、情绪语气、背景音乐及环境氛围，长时生成中保持多角色音色一致性，无需后期多轨混音。模型支持0样本多模态输入，无需额外训练即可生成；实现音色与风格解耦控制及"一声多角"能力。一次支持2分钟音频创作，多次延长保持音色统一。已开启火山方舟API邀测，个人用户享30分钟创作额度，即将上线剪映、即梦、番茄等产品。

multiSourceItems.title: Seed2.1 正式发布，深入 AI 生产力
multiSourceItems.summary: 字节Seed发布Seed2.1系列，面向真实生产力场景的智能体，强化通用Agent能力、代码工程交付与多模态理解。Seed2.1 Pro在GDPval基准获最高分，Agents' Last Exam位列参评模型第一梯队；MobileWorld手机GUI任务最高分，CreativeWork多环境任务表现突出。多模态在CharXiv-RQ等多项基准取得SOTA。代码能力上，Seed2.1 Pro在NL2Repo-Bench表现良好，开发者评测相比Claude Opus 4.6获59.1%胜率。模型已在豆包、TRAE上线，API通过火山方舟提供。

multiSourceItems.title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation
multiSourceItems.description: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack
multiSourceItems.summary: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack effective mechanisms to align dense 2D image tokens with sparse 3D voxel latents, resulting in a cross-modal correspondence bottleneck. To address these issues, we propose FLUX3D, a scalable image-to-3DGS framework that boosts both representation learning and cross-modal alignment during generation. We first revisit 2D feature selection for sparse-voxel-based 3D representation learning, propose Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT) and couple it with a decoder-only architecture to improve 3DGS reconstruction fidelity. We also design a sparse-structure-aware diffusion framework, which integrates the Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT) and Modal-Aware Rotary Positional Embedding (MARoPE) to achieve geometry-agnostic 2D-3D alignment. Extensive benchmark experiments demonstrate that FLUX3D yields substantial improvements in appearance fidelity and significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.
multiSourceItems.author: Haorui Ji, Weizhe Liu, Hongdong Li, Hengkai Guo
multiSourceItems.recommendedReason: Matched AI developer keywords: embedding, alignment, benchmark

multiSourceItems.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
multiSourceItems.description: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct
multiSourceItems.summary: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct more than 100 controlled ablation experiments to systematically investigate each stage of the pipeline, yielding insights on the importance of task sources and diversity. We then assemble a training set of 100K examples from our pipeline and fine-tune Qwen3-32B on this dataset, which yields an average accuracy of 44.8% across seven agentic benchmarks and a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model (Nemotron-Terminal-32B, 40.9%). Moreover, our training data exhibits strong scaling properties, outperforming alternative open datasets at every training set size in compute-controlled comparisons. We publicly release our training sets, data pipeline, experimental data, and models at openthoughts.ai to support future open research on agentic model training.
multiSourceItems.author: Negin Raoof, Richard Zhuang, Marianna Nezhurina, Etash Guha, Atula Tejaswi, Ryan Marten, Charlie F. Ruan, Tyler Griggs, Alexander Glenn Shaw, Hritik Bansal, E. multiSourceItems.title: It's Complicated: On the Design and Evaluation of AI-Powered AAC Interfaces
multiSourceItems.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) can enhance what people who use augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) are able to do with their systems. However, evaluating AI-powered AAC interfaces can be difficult. People are intersectional beings and current evaluation metrics can struggle to capture the multifaceted and nuanced desires people may have for their AAC. We explore the complicated nature of six AAC problem spaces, explore how AI might be used in these spaces, and suggest more robust meth
multiSourceItems.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) can enhance what people who use augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) are able to do with their systems. However, evaluating AI-powered AAC interfaces can be difficult. People are intersectional beings and current evaluation metrics can struggle to capture the multifaceted and nuanced desires people may have for their AAC. We explore the complicated nature of six AAC problem spaces, explore how AI might be used in these spaces, and suggest more robust methods of evaluation that take the intersectional nuances of people into account. We also discuss broader issues that arise across these problem spaces and how they could be addressed using our proposed evaluation methods.
multiSourceItems.author: Blade Frisch, Will Wade, Dylan Gaines, Michelle Kinsella, Betts Peters, Tamara Broderick, Keith Vertanen
multiSourceItems.recommendedReason: Matched AI developer keywords: evaluation

multiSourceItems.title: Real vs. Complex Spectral Bases for Neural Operators: The Role of Green's Function Alignment
multiSourceItems.description: Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) learn solution operators of partial differential equations by parameterizing global convolutions in the complex Fourier domain. For real-valued PDE solutions, the complex FFT carries representational redundancy through conjugate symmetry. We introduce the Hartley Neural Operator (HNO), the exact real-valued mirror of FNO: it replaces the FFT with the purely real Discrete Hartley Transform and learns a single real multiplier per retained spectral mode, with no compl
multiSourceItems.summary: Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) learn solution operators of partial differential equations by parameterizing global convolutions in the complex Fourier domain. For real-valued PDE solutions, the complex FFT carries representational redundancy through conjugate symmetry. We introduce the Hartley Neural Operator (HNO), the exact real-valued mirror of FNO: it replaces the FFT with the purely real Discrete Hartley Transform and learns a single real multiplier per retained spectral mode, with no complex arithmetic. Because the real Hartley spectrum is not halved by conjugate symmetry, HNO retains twice as many frequency corners as FNO but one real weight where FNO carries a complex pair, so the two operators are iso-parametric at equal width and differ only in spectral basis. Our central thesis is that the best basis is a property of the operator. Self-adjoint elliptic operators (Poisson, biharmonic) have real, symmetric Green's functions that the real Hartley multiplier diagonalizes exactly, and HNO is favored there. Time-dependent operators carry phase, from oscillation in the wave equation to transport in advection, Burgers, and Navier-Stokes, which a real diagonal multiplier cannot represent, so FNO is favored there, and increasingly so with the operator's phase content, leaving the phaseless heat equation as the borderline case. Training both operators identically and benchmarking across PDE classes, initial-condition families, and boundary conditions, we find an elliptic-versus-time-dependent split that is monotone in operator phase content and matches the Green's-function theory we develop. Rather than a universal winner, our findings give a predictive rule: match the spectral basis to the symmetry of the solution operator.
multiSourceItems.author: Jason Sulskis, Sathya Ravi
multiSourceItems.recommendedReason: Matched AI developer keywords: alignment, benchmark

multiSourceItems.title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation
multiSourceItems.description: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reas
multiSourceItems.summary: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reasoning framework for query-conditioned image generation. IV-CoT decomposes the visual conditioning queries into a structural-to-semantic cascade, where structural queries first form a latent visual plan and semantic queries then render appearance conditioned on this plan. To guide the structural queries, we introduce training-only sketch supervision, which encourages them to capture structure from sketches without requiring sketch extraction or intermediate decoding at inference time. IV-CoT performs implicit CoT reasoning in a single forward pass and achieves superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench. Visualizations and analyses demonstrate that the learned structural and semantic queries play complementary roles in structure-aware generation.
multiSourceItems.author: Zixuan Li, Haokun Lin, Yicheng Xiao, Zhiwei Li, Xinyang Song, Zelong Zheng, Yong He, Heng Yao, Ke Ding, Chao Yu, Chuan Yuan, Qi Li, Zhenan Sun

trendEntities.title: LLM Research Is Fake
思考即回忆：推理如何解锁LLM中的参数化知识
normalizedKeys: title:思考即回忆 推理如何解锁llm中的参数化知识

items.title: 思考即回忆：推理如何解锁LLM中的参数化知识
items.summary: Google Research研究发现，推理（chain-of-thought）能帮助大语言模型（LLM）回忆简单事实，即使这些事实无需复杂推导。在Gemini-2.5 Flash和Pro以及Qwen3-32B上，启用推理后模型能够回答原本无法直接回答的简单问题，pass@k显示正确事实存在于输出分布中。该现象由两个机制驱动：一是生成的推理token充当计算缓冲，允许模型进行隐藏计算以提取参数化知识；二是推理过程中产生的相关事实起到启动效应（factual priming），帮助模型激活正确答案。

trendEntities.title: Figma在Config 2026押注人类判断，画布AI能力却来自第三方
normalizedKeys: title:figma在config 2026押注人类判断 画布ai能力却来自第三方

items.title: Figma在Config 2026押注人类判断，画布AI能力却来自第三方
items.summary: Figma在Config 2026将设计画布扩展至代码、动画、3D深度和着色器效果，并集成去年收购的Weave工作流系统。新功能包括Code Layers（代码与设计并存）、Motion动画、深度层、Shader及Generative Plugins。协作方面，团队可搜索复用AI提示词、保存工作流为技能、共享插件。Figma的AI功能依赖Anthropic、OpenAI和Google等外部模型，推理成本挤压利润率。同时，Anthropic等公司的竞争产品可直接生成界面，构成威胁。

trendEntities.title: Qwen-AgentWorld：原生语言世界模型，模拟7种Agent环境并超越Claude Opus 4.8和GPT-5.4
normalizedKeys: title:qwen agentworld 原生语言世界模型 模拟7种agent环境并超越claude opus 4 8和gpt 5 4

items.title: Qwen-AgentWorld：原生语言世界模型，模拟7种Agent环境并超越Claude Opus 4.8和GPT-5.4
items.summary: Qwen-AgentWorld是一个原生语言世界模型，端到端以环境建模为训练目标，而非事后适配。它在单一模型中模拟MCP、Search、Terminal、SWE、Web、OS、Android等7种Agent环境，并在AgentWorldBench上超越Claude Opus 4.8和GPT-5.4。两个探索方向：1）将世界模型用作可控Sim RL的环境模拟器，模拟环境训练的Agent在部分任务上超过真实环境训练；2）仅做环境预测（不进行Agent训练）的预测能力零微调迁移到多轮Agent任务，在多个benchmark上均有提升。已开源35B MoE版本及对应benchmark。

trendEntities.title: NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel：一行代码加速Transformer MoE模型微调
normalizedKeys: title:nvidia nemo automodel 一行代码加速transformer moe模型微调

items.title: NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel：一行代码加速Transformer MoE模型微调
items.summary: NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 是基于 Transformers v5 的开源库，添加 Expert Parallelism、DeepEP 融合 all-to-all 调度和 TransformerEngine 内核。在 MoE 模型微调中，相比原生 v5，训练吞吐量提升 3.4-3.7 倍，GPU 内存减少 29-32%，仅需改动一行 import。在 16 节点 128 张 H100 上全微调 Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B A55B 时，v5 因内存不足无法运行，而 AutoModel 凭借 EP=64 专家并行使训练可行。单节点 30B MoE 模型（如 Qwen3-30B-A3B）同样获得可量化的性能优势。

trendEntities.title: Mistral AI 为 Connectors 推出多项安全与可控新能力
normalizedKeys: title:mistral ai 为 connectors 推出多项安全与可控新能力

items.title: Mistral AI 为 Connectors 推出多项安全与可控新能力
items.summary: 2026年6月24日，Mistral AI 发布 Connectors 多项新能力：Enriched admin controls（GA）支持按工作空间设置连接器访问权限并单独开关工具；API keys with connector scopes（GA）防止自动化 AI 工作负载中身份冒充；Multi-account connectors（GA）允许单个连接器绑定多个账户；Connectors Debugger（公开预览）对 MCP 连接器进行端到端根因分析；Connectors in Vibe Code（GA）和 Connectors in Workflows（公开预览）分别允许在开发者界面复用连接器及支持长时间运行任务不中断。

trendEntities.title: 里德·霍夫曼称SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，xAI则是"彻底的灾难"
normalizedKeys: title:里德 霍夫曼称spacex 不是一家人工智能公司 xai则是 彻底的灾难

items.title: 里德·霍夫曼称SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，xAI则是"彻底的灾难"
items.summary: LinkedIn联合创始人、Anthropic和OpenAI投资者Reid Hoffman在播客中公开批评SpaceX和xAI。他指出SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，6月12日上市后收购AI编程工具Cursor属于"花钱买相关性"；xAI则是"彻底的灾难"，所有11位联合创始人已离职，Grok模型在基准测试中落后于Anthropic和OpenAI。他还批评美国政府6月11日以出口管制为由强制Anthropic下架Fable和Mythos模型，理由仅为Amazon CEO报告Fable 5存在jailbreak漏洞，称此举"专断随意"。Hoffman认为Anthropic和OpenAI均有巨大发展空间，但Cursor可能已过巅峰。他建议年轻人不要抵制AI。

trendEntities.title: 字节跳动技术副总裁洪定坤：AI Coding 的实践与探索
normalizedKeys: title:字节跳动技术副总裁洪定坤 ai coding 的实践与探索

items.title: 字节跳动技术副总裁洪定坤：AI Coding 的实践与探索
items.summary: 在火山引擎Force大会，字节跳动技术副总裁洪定坤分享AI Coding实践。过去一年，字节AI代码贡献率增长6倍，tokens消耗增长5倍，但过度关注单一指标可能失真--TRAE团队代码超90%由AI生成，人均需求吞吐率仅提升60%。900次实验显示，主流Coding模型组合代码正确率超80%，但可交付性仅40-60分；结合Harness基建后提升至80分。AI降低编程门槛但需优化指标、治理、协作。字节探索原型驱动开发，能力沉淀至TRAE（日均Token消耗5.6万亿，增长50倍），并推出TRAE Work。

trendEntities.title: 火山引擎推出Agent Ready基础设施，AgentKit与ArkClaw企业版升级
normalizedKeys: title:火山引擎推出agent ready基础设施 agentkit与arkclaw企业版升级

items.title: 火山引擎推出Agent Ready基础设施，AgentKit与ArkClaw企业版升级
items.summary: 火山引擎在FORCE大会推出面向企业智能应用的Agent Ready基础设施，构建AI云与Agent三层架构。AgentKit升级提供Identity、Runtime、Sandbox、Evaluation等模块，实现Agent可靠、可控、可衡量。Identity已接入数千家身份体系，Runtime支持长程任务和分钟级12万沙箱并发。ArkClaw企业版集成Agent广场、技能中心与企业知识库，支持IDP/SSO/OAuth及飞书、钉钉等IM入口统一管控。实践案例：海底捞门店经营Agent将小时级工作压缩到分钟级，人工跟进时长缩减70%，巡检满意度提升50%；创维酷开借助ArkClaw终端版打造AIOS，Token消耗节省50%，支撑百万级终端。

trendEntities.title: DFlash：块扩散草稿模型实现最高15倍吞吐量提升
normalizedKeys: title:dflash 块扩散草稿模型实现最高15倍吞吐量提升

items.title: DFlash：块扩散草稿模型实现最高15倍吞吐量提升
items.summary: DFlash 由 UC San Diego 团队提出，是一种用于投机解码的轻量块扩散草稿模型。它一次前向推理生成整块 token，再由目标模型并行验证，保证输出无损。相比 EAGLE-3，DFlash 实现最高 2.5 倍加速，在 Qwen3-8B 等多种模型上平均无损加速超过 6 倍（MATH-500 达 6.08×）。在 NVIDIA Blackwell 上（TensorRT-LLM），gpt-oss-120b 模型吞吐量提升最高 15 倍，约为 EAGLE-3 的 1.5 倍。核心创新是将目标模型多层隐藏特征注入草稿模型每一层的 Key-Value 投影，使接受长度随草稿深度增长。

normalizedKeys: title:minicpm v 4 6 在 apple core ai 上高速运行

items.title: MiniCPM-V 4.6 在 Apple Core AI 上高速运行
items.summary: 🥳感谢分享，@MLBoy_DaisukeMajima 🚀 MiniCPM-V 4.6 在设备上以这样的速度运行，实在令人印象深刻--尤其是在 Apple Core AI 上以不到 2B 参数跑出。 干得漂亮，推动高效多模态 AI 向前发展。🫡

trendEntities.title: OpenAI ChatGPT 语音最大规模升级：双向AI语音模型 Bidi 1 已上线测试
normalizedKeys: title:openai chatgpt 语音最大规模升级 双向ai语音模型 bidi 1 已上线测试

items.title: OpenAI ChatGPT 语音最大规模升级：双向AI语音模型 Bidi 1 已上线测试
items.summary: 6月23日，部分用户反馈 ChatGPT 网页版和 App 版上线了双向 AI 语音模型 Bidi 1，位于设置模型选择器中，与标准语音和高级语音并列。该模型支持边说话边监听，用户可在对话中途打断并发出新指令，例如要求从1数到10时中途喊停倒数，模型会立即切换执行。OpenAI 尚未官宣，预计本周启动更大范围测试。

trendEntities.title: Qwen-AgentWorld 开源：让 Agent 学会"先预测，再行动"
normalizedKeys: title:qwen agentworld 开源 让 agent 学会 先预测 再行动

items.title: Qwen-AgentWorld 开源：让 Agent 学会"先预测，再行动"
items.summary: 通义千问推出首个原生语言世界模型 Qwen-AgentWorld，覆盖 MCP、Search、Terminal、SWE、Web、OS、Android 七大领域。模型基于超 1000 万条真实交互轨迹，经 CPT→SFT→RL 三阶段训练，在 AgentWorldBench 上超越 GPT-5.4（58.25）和 Claude Opus 4.8，Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B 取得 58.71 分。两种范式已验证其能力：作为解耦环境模拟器实现可控 Sim RL，在 WideSearch 上超越真实环境 RL（F1 50.3% vs 45.6%）；作为智能体基础模型，LWM 预热可迁移至七个基准（三个完全未出现在训练集中）。模型与评测基准已开源。

trendEntities.title: 今天，豆包正式推出专业版
normalizedKeys: title:今天 豆包正式推出专业版

items.title: 今天，豆包正式推出专业版
items.summary: 豆包专业版基于豆包2.1系列大模型上线，面向复杂办公与生产力场景。办公任务模式接入可执行Agent任务的豆包2.1模型，支持操作本地电脑、浏览器、调用Skills技能、定时任务，内置Office办公套件，并可生成带后端数据库的在线应用。免费用户可体验豆包2.1 Turbo版办公任务模式，专业版接入豆包2.1 Pro模型。定价：标准套餐68元/月（连续包月），加强套餐200元/月，高级套餐500元/月。大学生认证后标准套餐38元/月，持续6个月。

trendEntities.title: FFASR 排行榜发布：真实远场条件下 ASR 评测
normalizedKeys: title:ffasr 排行榜发布 真实远场条件下 asr 评测

items.title: FFASR 排行榜发布：真实远场条件下 ASR 评测
items.summary: Treble Technologies 与 Hugging Face 联合推出 FFASR（Far-Field ASR）排行榜，这是首个开源社区驱动的真实远场声学条件 ASR 评测基准。传统近场评测无法反映混响、背景噪声和麦克风距离带来的性能下降。FFASR 使用混合波模拟引擎生成声学数据，涵盖 14 种房间（20-470 m3）和三个信噪比级别（远场高 SNR >14 dB、中 SNR 8-12 dB、低 SNR <6 dB），加上近场干燥条件，共四类条件决定主排名。另有实验室实测/模拟验证轨道和移动声源 beta 版。性能指标同时报告词错误率（WER）和实时因子（RTFx，在 NVIDIA L4 GPU 上评估）。未来将支持多说话人场景、麦克风阵列和回声消除。

trendEntities.title: AI招聘工具存在种族偏见和系统性排斥；黑人占比26%，亚裔占比15%
normalizedKeys: title:ai招聘工具存在种族偏见和系统性排斥 黑人占比26 亚裔占比15

items.title: AI招聘工具存在种族偏见和系统性排斥；黑人占比26%，亚裔占比15%
items.summary: 一项覆盖340万人、400万份申请、150家雇主和1700个职位的大规模实地研究发现，AI招聘筛选工具存在显著的种族歧视：26%的黑人申请者和15%的亚裔申请者遭遇算法对其族群的系统性排斥；若AI按推荐率最高群体（通常为白人）标准执行，将有4万份额外申请进入下一轮。多数雇主依赖同一第三方供应商算法，形成"算法单一文化"，导致10%提交4份申请者被所有职位拒绝。对比同期未用AI的招聘数据（8.3万份申请、108家财富500强企业），未发现此类模式。研究呼吁对算法招聘进行独立监管。

trendEntities.title: Oracle因AI应用裁员21000人，债务驱动云基础设施投资
normalizedKeys: title:oracle因ai应用裁员21000人 债务驱动云基础设施投资

items.title: Oracle因AI应用裁员21000人，债务驱动云基础设施投资
items.summary: Oracle在截至5月31日的财年裁员21000人，员工总数降至141，000人，降幅12.9%。公司称AI技术的采用导致劳动力缩减，同时重组成本达18亿美元，同比增长481%。Oracle计划2026年通过债务和股权筹集450至500亿美元，扩建Oracle Cloud Infrastructure，服务OpenAI、xAI、AMD、Nvidia、Meta等客户。公司债务超1200亿美元。分析人士指出裁员有助于改善现金流，但Oracle也承认大规模裁员可能带来生产力下降、人才短缺和员工士气受损等风险。

trendEntities.title: GitHub联合开源联盟呼吁修改加州AI透明度法案以保护开源
normalizedKeys: title:github联合开源联盟呼吁修改加州ai透明度法案以保护开源

items.title: GitHub联合开源联盟呼吁修改加州AI透明度法案以保护开源
items.summary: GitHub 联合 Black Forest Labs、Hugging Face 与 Mozilla Corporation 组成开源联盟，呼吁对加州 AI 透明度法案（SB 942，拟由 SB 1000 修正）进行针对性修改。当前草案要求开发者在下游用户未履行义务时撤销开源许可证，这与开源许可证永久不可撤销的性质冲突。联盟认为该要求非必要，已有直接监管和执法机制，并建议参考欧盟 AI 法案的透明度实践规范，以向下游用户通知最佳实践文档的方式替代撤销条款。GitHub 支持这些修正，以在保持透明度目标的同时兼容开源开发模式。

trendEntities.title: IBM 开源 CUGA：轻量级智能体框架，提供二十余个单文件示例应用
normalizedKeys: title:ibm 开源 cuga 轻量级智能体框架 提供二十余个单文件示例应用

items.title: IBM 开源 CUGA：轻量级智能体框架，提供二十余个单文件示例应用
items.summary: IBM 开源了 CUGA（Configurable Generalist Agent），一个处理规划、执行循环、工具调用和状态管理的轻量级智能体框架。开发者只需提供工具列表和提示词即可构建 CugaAgent。内置计划-执行-反思循环，在 AppWorld（2025年7月-2026年2月）和 WebArena（2025年2月-9月）基准上排名第一。支持 Fast / Balanced / Accurate 三种推理模式，代码执行可在本地、Docker 或 E2B 沙箱中运行。可互换工具支持 OpenAPI、MCP 和 LangChain 函数，通过环境变量一键切换 OpenAI、watsonx、Ollama 等提供商。随框架发布二十余个单文件示例应用，涵盖电影推荐、IBM Cloud 架构顾问等场景，每个应用仅需一个 FastAPI 文件。
items.description: IBM 开源了 CUGA（Configurable Generalist Agent），一个处理规划、执行循环、工具调用和状态管理的轻量级智能体框架。开发者只需提供工具列表和提示词即可构建 CugaAgent。内置计划-执行-反思循环，在 AppWorld（2025年7月-2026年2月）和 WebArena（2025年2月-9月）基准上排名第一。支持 Fast / Balanced / Accurate 三种推理模式，代码执行可在本地、Docker 或 E2B 沙箱中运行。可互换工具支持 OpenAPI、MCP 和 LangChain 函数，通过环境变量一键切换 OpenAI、watsonx、Ollama 等提供商。随框架发布二十余个单文件示例应用，涵盖电影推荐、IBM Cloud 架构顾问等场景，每个应用仅需一个 FastAPI 文件。

trendEntities.title: 网易有道发布 Confucius4-TTS：14 语种跨语种无口音语音克隆开源模型
normalizedKeys: title:网易有道发布 confucius4 tts 14 语种跨语种无口音语音克隆开源模型

items.title: 网易有道发布 Confucius4-TTS：14 语种跨语种无口音语音克隆开源模型
items.summary: 网易有道推出"子曰 4.0"TTS 引擎 Confucius4-TTS，声称是业内首个支持 14 种语言跨语种无口音、且无需参考文本即可完成语音克隆的开源模型。用户仅需 3 秒音频即可实现零样本音色克隆，克隆音色与原声相似度超 85%，任务准确度达 97%。模型支持中文、英语等 14 种语言，首创音频 Prompt 情感克隆迁移。底层采用 GPT 式语义大模型、SSL 预训练特征与 ECAPA-TDNN 说话人编码器、Flow Matching 框架。已全量开源（Apache 协议），提供 54GB 资源包供本地部署。

trendEntities.title: 国内首个高考志愿AI测评出炉，千问多项表现超过资深咨询师
normalizedKeys: title:国内首个高考志愿ai测评出炉 千问多项表现超过资深咨询师

items.title: 国内首个高考志愿AI测评出炉，千问多项表现超过资深咨询师
items.summary: 友松实验室发布国内首个高考志愿AI能力测评报告，测试千问高考志愿填报Agent四大模块。与53位平均从业4.6年的人类咨询师对照，千问表现更稳定精确：44道事实题全对；模拟10个志愿中6个可录取；100场匿名对比中专家58次倾向千问回答。使用千问辅助后，人类咨询师正确率提升，耗时减少约27%。该Agent基于千问高考志愿大模型和夸克8年高考数据，覆盖约3000所院校、2000多个专业。

trendEntities.title: 五眼联盟警告：AI网络威胁数月内将影响普通用户
normalizedKeys: title:五眼联盟警告 ai网络威胁数月内将影响普通用户

items.title: 五眼联盟警告：AI网络威胁数月内将影响普通用户
items.summary: 2026年6月22日，五眼联盟（美、英、加、澳、新）网络安全部门联合警告，即将到来的AI模型（如OpenAI的GPT-5.5-Cyber、Anthropic的Mythos）将降低编写复杂攻击代码的门槛。自动化智能体可全天候扫描互联网漏洞，大幅缩短安全窗口期。AI驱动的超个性化钓鱼诈骗已在亚太蔓延，印度2026年初勒索软件事件激增165%。五眼联盟建议企业部署自动化防御AI，个人用户开启多因素认证、删除闲置账户。

items.title: 京东全栈开源JoyAI-VL-Interaction，从"一问一答"走向"边看边说"
items.summary: 京东近日开源全球首个全栈交互模型JoyAI-VL-Interaction，获vLLM-Omni原生支持。该模型能持续观察视频流、主动判断关键事件并实时响应，支持将复杂任务委托后台Agent处理。在58个真人盲评中，对比豆包视频通话助手胜率77.6%，对比Gemini视频通话助手胜率87.9%，监控预警场景达100%胜率。开源内容包括模型权重、交互数据集、训练方案及完整可部署系统，支持摄像头、直播流等视频输入及语音交互、长期记忆、vLLM部署，适用于安防监控、老人看护、直播讲解等实时场景。

items.title: 豆包音频生成模型1.0发布，重新定义AI音频创作
items.summary: 火山引擎正式发布豆包音频生成模型1.0（Doubao-Seed-Audio 1.0），支持文本与音频参考生成，端到端输出目标音频。单条Prompt可编排多角色对白、情绪语气、背景音乐及环境氛围，长时生成中保持多角色音色一致性，无需后期多轨混音。模型支持0样本多模态输入，无需额外训练即可生成；实现音色与风格解耦控制及"一声多角"能力。一次支持2分钟音频创作，多次延长保持音色统一。已开启火山方舟API邀测，个人用户享30分钟创作额度，即将上线剪映、即梦、番茄等产品。

trendEntities.title: Seed2.1 正式发布，深入 AI 生产力
normalizedKeys: title:seed2 1 正式发布 深入 ai 生产力

items.title: Seed2.1 正式发布，深入 AI 生产力
items.summary: 字节Seed发布Seed2.1系列，面向真实生产力场景的智能体，强化通用Agent能力、代码工程交付与多模态理解。Seed2.1 Pro在GDPval基准获最高分，Agents' Last Exam位列参评模型第一梯队；MobileWorld手机GUI任务最高分，CreativeWork多环境任务表现突出。多模态在CharXiv-RQ等多项基准取得SOTA。代码能力上，Seed2.1 Pro在NL2Repo-Bench表现良好，开发者评测相比Claude Opus 4.6获59.1%胜率。模型已在豆包、TRAE上线，API通过火山方舟提供。

trendEntities.title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation
normalizedKeys: title:flux3d high fidelity 3d gaussian generation with diffusion aligned sparse representation

items.title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation
items.description: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. items.summary: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack effective mechanisms to align dense 2D image tokens with sparse 3D voxel latents, resulting in a cross-modal correspondence bottleneck. To address these issues, we propose FLUX3D, a scalable image-to-3DGS framework that boosts both representation learning and cross-modal alignment during generation. We first revisit 2D feature selection for sparse-voxel-based 3D representation learning, propose Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT) and couple it with a decoder-only architecture to improve 3DGS reconstruction fidelity. We also design a sparse-structure-aware diffusion framework, which integrates the Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT) and Modal-Aware Rotary Positional Embedding (MARoPE) to achieve geometry-agnostic 2D-3D alignment. Extensive benchmark experiments demonstrate that FLUX3D yields substantial improvements in appearance fidelity and significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.

sourceItems.title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation
sourceItems.description: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. sourceItems.summary: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack effective mechanisms to align dense 2D image tokens with sparse 3D voxel latents, resulting in a cross-modal correspondence bottleneck. To address these issues, we propose FLUX3D, a scalable image-to-3DGS framework that boosts both representation learning and cross-modal alignment during generation. We first revisit 2D feature selection for sparse-voxel-based 3D representation learning, propose Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT) and couple it with a decoder-only architecture to improve 3DGS reconstruction fidelity. We also design a sparse-structure-aware diffusion framework, which integrates the Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT) and Modal-Aware Rotary Positional Embedding (MARoPE) to achieve geometry-agnostic 2D-3D alignment. Extensive benchmark experiments demonstrate that FLUX3D yields substantial improvements in appearance fidelity and significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.
sourceItems.author: Haorui Ji, Weizhe Liu, Hongdong Li, Hengkai Guo
sourceItems.recommendedReason: Matched AI developer keywords: embedding, alignment, benchmark

trendEntities.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models

items.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
items.description: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct
items.summary: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct more than 100 controlled ablation experiments to systematically investigate each stage of the pipeline, yielding insights on the importance of task sources and diversity. We then assemble a training set of 100K examples from our pipeline and fine-tune Qwen3-32B on this dataset, which yields an average accuracy of 44.8% across seven agentic benchmarks and a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model (Nemotron-Terminal-32B, 40.9%). Moreover, our training data exhibits strong scaling properties, outperforming alternative open datasets at every training set size in compute-controlled comparisons. We publicly release our training sets, data pipeline, experimental data, and models at openthoughts.ai to support future open research on agentic model training.

normalizedKeys: title:it s complicated on the design and evaluation of ai powered aac interfaces

items.title: It's Complicated: On the Design and Evaluation of AI-Powered AAC Interfaces
items.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) can enhance what people who use augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) are able to do with their systems. However, evaluating AI-powered AAC interfaces can be difficult. People are intersectional beings and current evaluation metrics can struggle to capture the multifaceted and nuanced desires people may have for their AAC. We explore the complicated nature of six AAC problem spaces, explore how AI might be used in these spaces, and suggest more robust meth
items.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) can enhance what people who use augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) are able to do with their systems. However, evaluating AI-powered AAC interfaces can be difficult. People are intersectional beings and current evaluation metrics can struggle to capture the multifaceted and nuanced desires people may have for their AAC. We explore the complicated nature of six AAC problem spaces, explore how AI might be used in these spaces, and suggest more robust methods of evaluation that take the intersectional nuances of people into account. We also discuss broader issues that arise across these problem spaces and how they could be addressed using our proposed evaluation methods.
items.author: Blade Frisch, Will Wade, Dylan Gaines, Michelle Kinsella, Betts Peters, Tamara Broderick, Keith Vertanen

trendEntities.title: Real vs. Complex Spectral Bases for Neural Operators: The Role of Green's Function Alignment
normalizedKeys: title:real vs complex spectral bases for neural operators the role of green s function alignment

items.title: Real vs. Complex Spectral Bases for Neural Operators: The Role of Green's Function Alignment
items.description: Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) learn solution operators of partial differential equations by parameterizing global convolutions in the complex Fourier domain. For real-valued PDE solutions, the complex FFT carries representational redundancy through conjugate symmetry. We introduce the Hartley Neural Operator (HNO), the exact real-valued mirror of FNO: it replaces the FFT with the purely real Discrete Hartley Transform and learns a single real multiplier per retained spectral mode, with no compl
items.summary: Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) learn solution operators of partial differential equations by parameterizing global convolutions in the complex Fourier domain. For real-valued PDE solutions, the complex FFT carries representational redundancy through conjugate symmetry. We introduce the Hartley Neural Operator (HNO), the exact real-valued mirror of FNO: it replaces the FFT with the purely real Discrete Hartley Transform and learns a single real multiplier per retained spectral mode, with no complex arithmetic. Because the real Hartley spectrum is not halved by conjugate symmetry, HNO retains twice as many frequency corners as FNO but one real weight where FNO carries a complex pair, so the two operators are iso-parametric at equal width and differ only in spectral basis. Our central thesis is that the best basis is a property of the operator. Self-adjoint elliptic operators (Poisson, biharmonic) have real, symmetric Green's functions that the real Hartley multiplier diagonalizes exactly, and HNO is favored there. Time-dependent operators carry phase, from oscillation in the wave equation to transport in advection, Burgers, and Navier-Stokes, which a real diagonal multiplier cannot represent, so FNO is favored there, and increasingly so with the operator's phase content, leaving the phaseless heat equation as the borderline case. Training both operators identically and benchmarking across PDE classes, initial-condition families, and boundary conditions, we find an elliptic-versus-time-dependent split that is monotone in operator phase content and matches the Green's-function theory we develop. Rather than a universal winner, our findings give a predictive rule: match the spectral basis to the symmetry of the solution operator.
items.author: Jason Sulskis, Sathya Ravi

trendEntities.title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation
normalizedKeys: title:iv cot implicit visual chain of thought for structure aware text to image generation

items.title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation
items.description: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reas
items.summary: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reasoning framework for query-conditioned image generation. IV-CoT decomposes the visual conditioning queries into a structural-to-semantic cascade, where structural queries first form a latent visual plan and semantic queries then render appearance conditioned on this plan. To guide the structural queries, we introduce training-only sketch supervision, which encourages them to capture structure from sketches without requiring sketch extraction or intermediate decoding at inference time. IV-CoT performs implicit CoT reasoning in a single forward pass and achieves superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench. Visualizations and analyses demonstrate that the learned structural and semantic queries play complementary roles in structure-aware generation.
items.author: Zixuan Li, Haokun Lin, Yicheng Xiao, Zhiwei Li, Xinyang Song, Zelong Zheng, Yong He, Heng Yao, Ke Ding, Chao Yu, Chuan Yuan, Qi Li, Zhenan Sun

items.title: 思考即回忆：推理如何解锁LLM中的参数化知识
items.summary: Google Research研究发现，推理（chain-of-thought）能帮助大语言模型（LLM）回忆简单事实，即使这些事实无需复杂推导。在Gemini-2.5 Flash和Pro以及Qwen3-32B上，启用推理后模型能够回答原本无法直接回答的简单问题，pass@k显示正确事实存在于输出分布中。该现象由两个机制驱动：一是生成的推理token充当计算缓冲，允许模型进行隐藏计算以提取参数化知识；二是推理过程中产生的相关事实起到启动效应（factual priming），帮助模型激活正确答案。

raw.titleEn: Thinking to recall： How reasoning unlocks parametric knowledge in LLMs

items.title: DFlash：块扩散草稿模型实现最高15倍吞吐量提升
items.summary: DFlash 由 UC San Diego 团队提出，是一种用于投机解码的轻量块扩散草稿模型。它一次前向推理生成整块 token，再由目标模型并行验证，保证输出无损。相比 EAGLE-3，DFlash 实现最高 2.5 倍加速，在 Qwen3-8B 等多种模型上平均无损加速超过 6 倍（MATH-500 达 6.08×）。在 NVIDIA Blackwell 上（TensorRT-LLM），gpt-oss-120b 模型吞吐量提升最高 15 倍，约为 EAGLE-3 的 1.5 倍。核心创新是将目标模型多层隐藏特征注入草稿模型每一层的 Key-Value 投影，使接受长度随草稿深度增长。

items.title: 京东全栈开源JoyAI-VL-Interaction，从"一问一答"走向"边看边说"
items.summary: 京东近日开源全球首个全栈交互模型JoyAI-VL-Interaction，获vLLM-Omni原生支持。该模型能持续观察视频流、主动判断关键事件并实时响应，支持将复杂任务委托后台Agent处理。在58个真人盲评中，对比豆包视频通话助手胜率77.6%，对比Gemini视频通话助手胜率87.9%，监控预警场景达100%胜率。开源内容包括模型权重、交互数据集、训练方案及完整可部署系统，支持摄像头、直播流等视频输入及语音交互、长期记忆、vLLM部署，适用于安防监控、老人看护、直播讲解等实时场景。

items.title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation
items.description: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. items.summary: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack effective mechanisms to align dense 2D image tokens with sparse 3D voxel latents, resulting in a cross-modal correspondence bottleneck. To address these issues, we propose FLUX3D, a scalable image-to-3DGS framework that boosts both representation learning and cross-modal alignment during generation. We first revisit 2D feature selection for sparse-voxel-based 3D representation learning, propose Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT) and couple it with a decoder-only architecture to improve 3DGS reconstruction fidelity. We also design a sparse-structure-aware diffusion framework, which integrates the Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT) and Modal-Aware Rotary Positional Embedding (MARoPE) to achieve geometry-agnostic 2D-3D alignment. Extensive benchmark experiments demonstrate that FLUX3D yields substantial improvements in appearance fidelity and significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.
items.author: Haorui Ji, Weizhe Liu, Hongdong Li, Hengkai Guo
items.recommendedReason: Matched AI developer keywords: embedding, alignment, benchmark

items.title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation
items.description: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reas
items.summary: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reasoning framework for query-conditioned image generation. IV-CoT decomposes the visual conditioning queries into a structural-to-semantic cascade, where structural queries first form a latent visual plan and semantic queries then render appearance conditioned on this plan. To guide the structural queries, we introduce training-only sketch supervision, which encourages them to capture structure from sketches without requiring sketch extraction or intermediate decoding at inference time. IV-CoT performs implicit CoT reasoning in a single forward pass and achieves superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench. Visualizations and analyses demonstrate that the learned structural and semantic queries play complementary roles in structure-aware generation.
items.author: Zixuan Li, Haokun Lin, Yicheng Xiao, Zhiwei Li, Xinyang Song, Zelong Zheng, Yong He, Heng Yao, Ke Ding, Chao Yu, Chuan Yuan, Qi Li, Zhenan Sun

sourceItems.title: 思考即回忆：推理如何解锁LLM中的参数化知识
sourceItems.summary: Google Research研究发现，推理（chain-of-thought）能帮助大语言模型（LLM）回忆简单事实，即使这些事实无需复杂推导。在Gemini-2.5 Flash和Pro以及Qwen3-32B上，启用推理后模型能够回答原本无法直接回答的简单问题，pass@k显示正确事实存在于输出分布中。该现象由两个机制驱动：一是生成的推理token充当计算缓冲，允许模型进行隐藏计算以提取参数化知识；二是推理过程中产生的相关事实起到启动效应（factual priming），帮助模型激活正确答案。

items.title: 里德·霍夫曼称SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，xAI则是"彻底的灾难"
items.summary: LinkedIn联合创始人、Anthropic和OpenAI投资者Reid Hoffman在播客中公开批评SpaceX和xAI。他指出SpaceX"不是一家人工智能公司"，6月12日上市后收购AI编程工具Cursor属于"花钱买相关性"；xAI则是"彻底的灾难"，所有11位联合创始人已离职，Grok模型在基准测试中落后于Anthropic和OpenAI。他还批评美国政府6月11日以出口管制为由强制Anthropic下架Fable和Mythos模型，理由仅为Amazon CEO报告Fable 5存在jailbreak漏洞，称此举"专断随意"。Hoffman认为Anthropic和OpenAI均有巨大发展空间，但Cursor可能已过巅峰。他建议年轻人不要抵制AI。

items.title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation
items.description: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. items.summary: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack effective mechanisms to align dense 2D image tokens with sparse 3D voxel latents, resulting in a cross-modal correspondence bottleneck. To address these issues, we propose FLUX3D, a scalable image-to-3DGS framework that boosts both representation learning and cross-modal alignment during generation. We first revisit 2D feature selection for sparse-voxel-based 3D representation learning, propose Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT) and couple it with a decoder-only architecture to improve 3DGS reconstruction fidelity. We also design a sparse-structure-aware diffusion framework, which integrates the Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT) and Modal-Aware Rotary Positional Embedding (MARoPE) to achieve geometry-agnostic 2D-3D alignment. Extensive benchmark experiments demonstrate that FLUX3D yields substantial improvements in appearance fidelity and significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.
items.author: Haorui Ji, Weizhe Liu, Hongdong Li, Hengkai Guo
items.recommendedReason: Matched AI developer keywords: embedding, alignment, benchmark

items.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
items.description: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct
items.summary: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct more than 100 controlled ablation experiments to systematically investigate each stage of the pipeline, yielding insights on the importance of task sources and diversity. We then assemble a training set of 100K examples from our pipeline and fine-tune Qwen3-32B on this dataset, which yields an average accuracy of 44.8% across seven agentic benchmarks and a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model (Nemotron-Terminal-32B, 40.9%). Moreover, our training data exhibits strong scaling properties, outperforming alternative open datasets at every training set size in compute-controlled comparisons. We publicly release our training sets, data pipeline, experimental data, and models at openthoughts.ai to support future open research on agentic model training.
items.author: Negin Raoof, Richard Zhuang, Marianna Nezhurina, Etash Guha, Atula Tejaswi, Ryan Marten, Charlie F. Ruan, Tyler Griggs, Alexander Glenn Shaw, Hritik Bansal, E.
